{{CargoRelic
|name=The Walking Man
|class_id=22023
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=06-05
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Jun 5, 1961 AD, the master sculptor Giacometti completed the Walking Man.<br>The Walking Man, one of the most iconic sculptures of the 20th century, is a masterpiece by Swedish sculptor Giacometti. It is the most well-known piece in the series and is viewed as a symbol of modern art. In 2010, the sculpture was sold for a staggering 65 million British pounds at an auction, making it one of the most expensive sculptures in the world.
|fame=23
|art=45
|fth=27
|civ=30
|tech=29
|ss1=Zombie Minion RUSH +1%
|ss2=Zombie Minion RUSH +2%
|ss3=Zombie Minion RUSH +3%
|ss4=Zombie Minion RUSH +5%
|ss7=Zombie Minion RUSH +5%<br>Zombie Minion RUSH +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Tadpolepond skill I.png|50px]]Place in Tadpole Pond: B-tad Output +5%
}}
